title: Waze adds Gemini-powered features and new customisation
summary: Waze has announced new AI-powered features and customisation updates, with some capabilities using Google’s Gemini assistant. The change is part of Google’s broader effort to place Gemini across its consumer products while Waze competes with other navigation services.
friendlySummary: Waze is adding new features and ways to personalise the app. Some of them use Google’s Gemini AI assistant.
whyItMatters: AI’s everyday value is increasingly judged inside familiar utilities rather than standalone chatbots. Navigation is a useful test case: assistance needs to reduce friction without becoming a distraction or an opaque decision-maker.
friendlyWhyItMatters: This shows how AI is moving into common apps people use every day. The best features should make travel easier without making driving more distracting.
